title: Plan your seating chart
subtitle: Place tables in the room and assign guests to seats with drag-and-drop.

steps.title: Add tables to the room
steps.body: Click "Add Table" to create a table — choose its name, capacity, and shape (round or rectangular). New tables appear in the room area; drag them anywhere to lay out your floor plan.
steps.tip: Use Zoom In/Out and Reset View to navigate large rooms comfortably.

steps.title: Assign guests to seats
steps.body: Unassigned guests appear in the side panel. Drag a guest onto any open seat at a table. To unassign, drag the guest back to the panel.
steps.tip: Tab and arrow keys also work — drag-and-drop is fully keyboard accessible.

steps.title: Try Auto-assign
steps.body: Short on time? Click Auto-assign and we'll seat your confirmed guests automatically based on table capacity. You can still tweak placements manually afterward.
steps.tip: Auto-assign respects existing seat assignments — it only fills empty seats.

steps.title: Export your plan
steps.body: When you're happy with the layout, click Export CSV to download a guest-by-table list you can share with your venue or print as a seating list.
steps.tip: Re-export any time — the CSV always reflects your latest assignments.
